rationale: The agent correctly read Issue #5, explored the codebase, identified the sparse docs/in_scope_endpoints.md needing expansion, read all relevant files (policy/endpoint_allowlist.yml, scripts/run_zap_baseline.sh, etc.), prepared the correct comprehensive documentation content, and attempted the write with proper arguments (including the correct SHA).
